data.body: LANDING IN PROGRESS — FFO churn. main is advancing ~every 20-30min (ee49b4a89→abdf44ef7→c71d0ce97→db492749f...) while each auto-lander re-CI cycle takes ~28min (full matrix), so the green stack keeps getting lapped and re-rebased (ps1→ps2→ps3...). Auto-lander drops the requester Autosubmit label on each of its own rebases (only LLM-Review carries via NO_CODE_CHANGE copy condition) and re-drives internally; LLM-Review+1 persists across rebases. Running a keep-alive monitor that re-applies Autosubmit whenever a green (Verified+1) change has it cleared, keeping the stack in the lander's FIFO queue until it wins a quiet window and atomic-submits. All 3 changes remain green on both gates on each fresh patchset; this is purely the FFO submit race, not a code/CI problem. Will close children (with merged-SHA evidence) + epic once MERGED.
